title: Monthly Data on India’s International Trade in Services for the Month of February 2026
description: The value of exports and imports of services during February 2026 are presented in the following table. International Trade in Services (US$ million) Month Receipts (Exports) Payments (Imports) October – 2025 35,174 (2.2) 17,734 (2.9) November – 2025 34,269 (6.7) 16,882 (-2.1) December – 2025 41,784 (13.0) 19,110 (7.4) January – 2026 38,165 (9.8) 16,631 (-0.5) February – 2026 34,708 (9.7) 16,865 (16.2) Note: (i) Data for January-February are provisional while those
